# Sal's Painting & Basic Renovations
> Residential painting contractor serving Carteret, NJ and Middlesex County. Interior painting, exterior painting, drywall repair, deck staining, trim and door painting, accent walls, and basic renovations. Available 7 days a week, 7AM–9PM. Free estimates.

## Contact
- Website: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/
- Phone: +1-727-644-7674
- Text: +1-727-644-7674
- Address: 54 Charles St, Carteret, NJ 07008
- Service Area: Middlesex County, NJ (Carteret, Perth Amboy, Woodbridge, Rahway, Linden, Iselin, Edison, Sayreville, South Amboy)
- Hours: Monday–Sunday 7AM–9PM

## Business Details
- Legal Name: Sal's Painting & Basic Renovations
- State: New Jersey
- Specialization: Residential painting contractor

## Services

### Interior Painting
Interior painting for walls, ceilings, trim, bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, hallways, and whole-home repaint work in Carteret and Middlesex County.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/interior-painting.html

### Exterior Painting
Exterior house painting for siding, trim, doors, shutters, and curb-appeal updates in Carteret and surrounding NJ towns.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/exterior-painting.html

### Drywall Repair and Prep
Drywall repair, hole patching, sanding, priming, and surface prep before painting in Carteret, NJ.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/drywall-repair-prep.html

### Trim, Doors, and Ceilings
Trim painting, door painting, and ceiling repaint work in Carteret and nearby Middlesex County homes.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/trim-doors-ceilings.html

### Accent Wall Painting
Custom accent wall painting for living rooms, bedrooms, and dining spaces in Carteret, NJ.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/accent-walls.html

### Deck and Fence Staining
Deck staining and fence painting for outdoor wood surfaces in Carteret and Middlesex County, NJ.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/deck-fence-staining.html

### Basic Renovations
Practical home renovation work paired with painting, drywall repair, and surface updates in Carteret, NJ.
URL: https://salspaintingrenovation.com/basic-renovations.html

## Service Area Towns
Carteret, Perth Amboy, Woodbridge, Rahway, Linden, Iselin, Edison, Sayreville, South Amboy — all in Middlesex County, NJ.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Do you offer free estimates?
Yes. Sal's Painting offers free estimates for all painting and renovation work. Call or text (727) 644-7674 or use the estimate form at https://salspaintingrenovation.com/contact.html

### What towns does Sal's Painting serve?
Carteret, Perth Amboy, Woodbridge, Rahway, Linden, Iselin, Edison, Sayreville, South Amboy, and nearby Middlesex County communities.

### Are you available on weekends?
Yes. Sal's Painting is available 7 days a week from 7AM to 9PM.

### Do you handle drywall repair before painting?
Yes. Patch work, sanding, priming, and surface prep are included when walls or ceilings need more than a quick repaint.

### What types of painting do you do?
Interior painting, exterior painting, deck staining, fence painting, trim and door painting, ceiling painting, accent walls, and paint prep services including drywall repair.

### How do I get a painting estimate in Carteret, NJ?
Call or text (727) 644-7674, or submit the online estimate form at https://salspaintingrenovation.com/contact.html. Include the town, surface type, and general scope for the fastest response.
